info.title: Ecommerce-buildTime
info.description: API for managing ecommerce platform features including products, orders, and user accounts.

tags.name: products
tags.description: Operations related to product management including listing, creation, update, and deletion.

tags.name: orders
tags.description: Manage customer orders, tracking, and order status updates.

tags.name: users
tags.description: User account operations such as registration, authentication, and profile management.

post.description: Create a new user account by providing the required user details. The request body must contain the user information, and a successful response returns the created user profile.

example.message: User data validation failed. Email format is invalid.
A user with the given email already exists.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Place a new order for a user
post.description: Place an order on behalf of a specified user by providing order details. The response returns the created order information.

example.message: Order data is incomplete or malformed.

details.issue: Order items list cannot be empty

404.description: User not found for the given ID

example.message: No user found with the provided userId.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve details of a specific order
get.description: Fetch detailed information about an existing order using its unique orderId. Returns order status, items, and other related info.

example.message: The provided orderId format is invalid.
No order exists with the specified orderId.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add an item to the user's cart
post.description: Add a specified item to the shopping cart of the given user. The request body describes the item to add. Successful response returns the updated cart details.

requestBody.description: Item to be added to the user's cart

example.message: Cart item data is invalid or missing required fields.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Get the current cart for a user
get.description: Retrieve the current shopping cart contents for the specified user. Returns detailed information including all items in the cart.

example.message: The provided userId format is invalid.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve tracking information for a specific order
get.description: Fetches the current shipping and tracking status for the specified order ID. Returns detailed tracking data if available, allowing the user to monitor the shipment progress.

200.description: Successful tracking information retrieval for the given order ID.

404.description: Tracking information not found for the specified order ID.

example.message: No tracking information found for order ID ord-7b3d8f2a.

details.issue: Tracking data does not exist for this order ID.

500.description: Internal server error occurred while attempting to retrieve tracking information.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add a new product to the product catalog
post.description: Registers a new product in the product catalog with all necessary details such as name, description, price, stock availability, and SKU. Returns the created product resource upon success.

requestBody.description: Details of the product to be added to the catalog.

example.name: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones
example.description: High quality wireless headphones with noise cancellation

200.description: Product successfully added to the catalog.

400.description: Invalid product data supplied in the request.

example.message: One or more product fields contain invalid data.

details.issue: Price must be a positive number.

409.description: Product with the given SKU already exists.

example.message: A product with SKU 'WH-1000XB' already exists.

500.description: Internal server error occurred while adding the product.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Receives and processes payment notifications from external payment gateways. Validates the payload and updates payment status accordingly.

requestBody.description: Notification payload received from payment gateway via webhook.

example.message: The webhook payload is missing required fields or contains invalid data.

402.description: Payment required or failed payment validation.

example.message: Payment authorization failed or payment is required before proceeding.

500.description: Internal server error occurred while processing webhook.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Starts a payment process for an order by accepting payment method and amount details. Returns confirmation of payment initiation and status.

requestBody.description: Payment initiation request details including amount and payment method.

example.message: Payment request is missing required fields or contains invalid data.

details.issue: Card number is invalid or missing.

402.description: Payment failed or payment is required before proceeding.

example.message: Payment authorization failed or payment must be completed.

details.issue: Payment method declined or not supported.

500.description: Internal server error occurred while initiating payment.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

gatewayResponse.description: Response message from the payment gateway

transactionId.description: Transaction identifier provided by the payment gateway

totalAmount.description: Total amount for the order before discounts

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was created

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied to the order

currency.description: Currency code used for the order

userId.description: Identifier of the user who placed the order

items.description: List of items included in the order

payableAmount.description: Final amount payable after discounts and taxes

paymentStatus.description: Current payment status for the order

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the order was last updated

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created

active.description: Indicates whether the user account is active

userType.description: Type or role of the user

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user details were last updated

description.example: Ergonomic wireless mouse with 2-year battery life.

currency.description: Currency code for the product price

category.description: Category to which the product belongs

stock.description: Available stock quantity of the product

quantity.description: Number of units ordered for this product

price.description: Price per unit before any discount is applied

discount.description: Discount amount applied to this product

finalPrice.description: Final price after discount for a single unit

quantity.description: Number of units selected in the cart

productId.description: Unique identifier for the product in the cart

price.description: Unit price of the product before discount

discount.description: Discount applied to the product unit

finalPrice.description: Final price per unit after discount

currency.description: Currency code used for price values

productName.description: Name of the product in the cart

lastUpdated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last tracking update

orderId.description: Unique identifier for the order being tracked

courierPartner.description: Name of the courier service handling the delivery

estimatedDelivery.description: Estimated delivery date in ISO 8601 format

trackingId.description: Tracking number assigned by the courier

totalAmount.description: Total price for all cart items before discounts

totalDiscount.description: Sum of discounts applied across all cart items

currency.description: Currency code for all price values

userId.description: Identifier of the user owning this cart

items.description: List of items currently in the shopping cart

payableAmount.description: Total amount to be paid after discounts

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to this cart

amount.description: The total amount to be paid

paymentMethod.description: Method used for payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal)

currency.description: Currency code of the payment amount

active.description: Indicates if the user account is active

createdAt.description: Date and time when the payment was created

paymentId.description: Unique identifier for the payment transaction

paymentMethod.description: Method used to process the payment

transactionId.description: External transaction identifier from payment gateway

createdAt.description: Date and time when the product was created

available.description: Indicates if the product is available for purchase

description.example: Ergonomic wireless mouse with adjustable DPI settings

currency.description: Currency code for the product price

stock.description: Number of products currently in stock

updatedAt.description: Date and time when the product information was last updated

error.description: A short description of the client error

message.description: Detailed message explaining the cause of the client error

status.description: HTTP status code representing the client error

path.description: The API endpoint path where the error was triggered

requestId.description: Unique identifier for the request causing the error

errorCode.description: Specific error code for finer error categorization

details.description: List of field-specific errors providing detailed validation issues

field.description: The name of the field with the validation error

issue.description: Description of the validation issue for the field

error.description: A short description of the server error

message.description: Detailed message explaining the cause of the server error

status.description: HTTP status code representing the server error

requestId.description: Unique identifier for the request causing the error
